title: gh-122170: Fix interpreter exiting due to ValueError from `os.stat` for too long filename on Windows
author: devdanzin
body:
This PR fixes the interpreter exiting on Windows in 3.13.0b4 and main due to `ValueError: stat: path too long for Windows` being raised by `os.stat()` in `updatecache()` in linecache.py when trying to print a traceback with a too long filename.

<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-122170 -->
* Issue: gh-122170
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->

comments.author: devdanzin
comments.body: Closing due to @picnixz's version being more complete and polished, thanks!
